Class MiiEncounter

java.lang.Object
org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Base
org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.BaseResource
org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Resource
org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.DomainResource
org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Encounter
de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.fhir.resources.MiiEncounter
All Implemented Interfaces:
ca.uhn.fhir.model.api.IElement, CaseIdentifierValueProvider, MiiPatientProvider, PatientIdentifierValueProvider, CaseIdProvider, PatientIdProvider, Serializable, org.hl7.fhir.instance.model.api.IAnyResource, org.hl7.fhir.instance.model.api.IBase, org.hl7.fhir.instance.model.api.IBaseHasExtensions, org.hl7.fhir.instance.model.api.IBaseHasModifierExtensions, org.hl7.fhir.instance.model.api.IBaseResource, org.hl7.fhir.instance.model.api.IDomainResource
Direct Known Subclasses:
MiiContactHealthFacility
public class MiiEncounter extends org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Encounter implements MiiPatientProvider, PatientIdentifierValueProvider, CaseIdentifierValueProvider

    isActive()
    Determines whether the passed encounter instance is in-progress.

    isCaseClassInpatient()
    Is the case class counted as "inpatient" regarding the json data specification (without pre-stationary and post-stationary cases)?
    boolean
    isCaseClassInpatientOrShortStay()
    Is the case class counted as "inpatient" regarding the json data specification (without pre-stationary and post-stationary cases)?
    boolean
    isCaseClassOutpatient()
    is the case class counted as "outpatient" regarding the json data specification (plus pre-stationary + post-stationary cases that are counted as "outpatient" logic-wise in the workflow aswell)
    boolean
    isCaseClassShortStay()
    Is the case class counted as "inpatient" regarding the json data specification (without pre-stationary and post-stationary cases)?

  • Field Details

    • patient

      protected MiiPatient patient

    • patientId

      protected String patientId

    • facilityContactId

      protected String facilityContactId

  • Constructor Details

    • MiiEncounter

      @Deprecated public MiiEncounter()
      Deprecated.
      This constructor is only used for Fhir resource validation purpose. Use other constructors for creating an instance of this resource.

    • MiiEncounter

      public MiiEncounter(String patientId, org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Enumeration<org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Encounter.EncounterStatus> encounterStatus, org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Coding encounterClass)
      Creates a new UkbEncounter object without defined MiiPatient. This object may be assigned later using initializeMiiPatient(MiiPatient). The patient is mandatory, therefore the patientId must be specified
      Parameters:
      patientId - the default system id of the patient
      encounterStatus - Encounter.EncounterStatus e.g. Encounter.EncounterStatus.INPROGRESS
      encounterClass - The EncounterClass e.g. "pre-stationary"

    • MiiEncounter

      @Deprecated public MiiEncounter(MiiPatient patient, org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Enumeration<org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Encounter.EncounterStatus> status, org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Coding encounterClass) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Deprecated.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException

      Auxiliary function to return the textual value of the visit number.

    • hasVisitNumberIdentifierValue

      public boolean hasVisitNumberIdentifierValue()

    • isIcuCase

      public boolean isIcuCase(Collection<String> icuLocationIds, boolean checkActiveOnly)

    • isCurrentlyOnIcuWard

      public boolean isCurrentlyOnIcuWard(Collection<String> icuLocationIds)

    • getIcuLocationComponents

      public List<org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Encounter.EncounterLocationComponent> getIcuLocationComponents(Collection<String> icuLocationIds, boolean checkActiveOnly)
      Returns the list of ICU Encounter.EncounterLocationComponents for this encounter whose referenced Location IDs are contained in icuLocationIds. Optionally restricts the result to locations that are currently active.
      Parameters:
      icuLocationIds - collection of ICU Location IDs (as returned by getIdBase()) to include
      checkActiveOnly - if true, only return components whose period has no end
      Returns:
      a list of matching Encounter.EncounterLocationComponents; never null

    • isPeriodStartExistent

      public boolean isPeriodStartExistent()
      Encounter.period.start is a mandatory field in the kds profile.
      Returns:
      True if Encounter.period.start is not null

    • getFacilityContactId

      public String getFacilityContactId()

    • isFacilityContact

      public boolean isFacilityContact()
      Determines whether the passed encounter type is a facility contact ("Einrichtungskontakt"). To ensure backwards compatibility, any missing type is considered as a facility contact as well.
      Returns:
      True if the encounter is a facility contact, otherwise false.

    • isActive

      public boolean isActive()
      Determines whether the passed encounter instance is in-progress.

    • isSupplyContact

      public boolean isSupplyContact()
      Determines whether the passed encounter type is a supply contact ("Versorgungsstellenkontakt").
      Returns:
      True if the encounter is a supply contact, otherwise false.

    • isDepartmentContact

      public boolean isDepartmentContact()
      Determines whether the passed encounter type is a department contact ("Abteilungskontakt").
      Returns:
      True if the encounter is a department contact, otherwise false.

    • isContactType

      public static boolean isContactType(MiiEncounter encounter, String contactLevelCode)
      Internal method to determine whether the passed encounter type matches the specified contact level code.
      Parameters:
      encounter - The encounter to be checked.
      contactLevelCode - The contact level code to match.
      Returns:
      True if the encounter matches the specified contact level code, otherwise false.

    • isCaseTypePreStationary

      public boolean isCaseTypePreStationary()
      A simple check if the given contact type got the value "prestationary".
      Returns:
      True if the case type equals "prestationary".

    • isCaseTypeIntensiveStationary

      public boolean isCaseTypeIntensiveStationary()
      A simple check if the given contact type got the value "intensivstationaer".
      Returns:
      True if the case type equals "intensivstationaer".

    • isCaseTypePostStationary

      public boolean isCaseTypePostStationary()
      A simple check if the given contact type got the value "prestationary".
      Returns:
      True if the case type equals "prestationary".

    • isCaseClassInpatient

      public boolean isCaseClassInpatient()
      Is the case class counted as "inpatient" regarding the json data specification (without pre-stationary and post-stationary cases)?
      Returns:
      True, if the case class of the encounter is "inpatient"

    • isCaseClassShortStay

      public boolean isCaseClassShortStay()
      Is the case class counted as "inpatient" regarding the json data specification (without pre-stationary and post-stationary cases)?
      Returns:
      True, if the case class of the encounter is "inpatient"

    • isCaseClassInpatientOrShortStay

      public boolean isCaseClassInpatientOrShortStay()
      Is the case class counted as "inpatient" regarding the json data specification (without pre-stationary and post-stationary cases)?
      Returns:
      True, if the case class of the encounter is "inpatient"

    • isCaseClassOutpatient

      public boolean isCaseClassOutpatient()
      is the case class counted as "outpatient" regarding the json data specification (plus pre-stationary + post-stationary cases that are counted as "outpatient" logic-wise in the workflow aswell)
      Returns:
      True, if the case class of the encounter is "outpatient".

    • isSemiStationary

      public boolean isSemiStationary()
      Is the case type semi stationary?
      Returns:
      True, if the encounter.type holds at least one entry with type = "teilstationär"

    • getContactType

      public static String getContactType(List<org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.CodeableConcept> listType)
      Retrieval of the value that is part of a slice in Encounter.type.
      Parameters:
      listType - List of Encounter.types.
      Returns:
      The contact-type of a german value set (e.g. "vorstationär").

    • isCurrentlyOnIcu

      public boolean isCurrentlyOnIcu(List<String> icuLocationIds)
      Checks whether the given encounter is currently in an ICU location or not.
      Parameters:
      icuLocationIds - The list of ICU location IDs to check against. If its empty it will return False.
      Returns:
      True if the encounter is currently in an ICU location; otherwise, False.

    • isPatientDeceased

      public boolean isPatientDeceased()
      Determine via the discharge disposition which is part of Encounter.getHospitalization() whether the patient is deceased within the scope of the case under review.
      Returns:
      false, if no valid discharge disposition can be found in the Encounter.getHospitalization() instance and true if the discharge code ("07") was found

    • getDischargeDiagnosisReferenceIds

      public List<String> getDischargeDiagnosisReferenceIds()
      Returns a list of reference IDs for discharge diagnoses from the patient's diagnosis list.

      A discharge diagnosis is identified by a use coding with the system "http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/diagnosis-role" and the code "DD".

      Returns:
      a list of reference strings to the condition resources marked as discharge diagnoses; returns an empty list if no such diagnoses are found or if no diagnosis is present.

    • isEncounterStatusValid

      public boolean isEncounterStatusValid()
      Filtering of non-usable encounters, for example, if they got canceled or entered in error.

      Since many data items rely explicit on Encounter.EncounterStatus.INPROGRESS or Encounter.EncounterStatus.FINISHED we filter already to the corresponding values.
